## Task Description
Add responsive design using media queries. The page should work well on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least one media query based on screen width
- [ ] Page layout reflowing properly on small/medium/large screens
- [ ] Tested in DevTools for phone, tablet, desktop
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request

## Related Lab Section
Part 2 - CSS / Responsiveness
